description: An accountant needs to reverse the prior month's AP accrual at the beginning of the new month.

nodes.task_description: Identify the main AP accrual journal entry from the prior month's close.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct journal entry.

nodes.task_description: Create a new journal entry dated the first day of the current month that exactly reverses the original entry.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the reversing entry (crediting expenses and debiting 'AP Accruals').
Agent successfully posts the entry, clearing the accrual account.
